dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_origin} sent {quest_threat_the} crashing through {quest_focus_the}. Half our homes are ruined and {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_has} nowhere to go.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The destruction attracted {enemy_type_plural} to the wreckage {location_hint}. They are feeding on our misery: looting the ruins and attacking anyone who tries to salvage what is left. We need them driven out before we can begin to recover.
dialogueChunks.outro: People are cold, scared, and hungry. Clear the {enemy_type_plural} so we can start picking up the pieces.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_threat_animate_the} {quest_threat_animate_is} sweeping toward {quest_stakes_the} and nothing we have done has slowed it. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_is} overwhelmed and we are losing ground fast.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The chaos has drawn {enemy_type_plural} out of the wilds {location_hint}. They sense weakness and they are closing in. If we do not thin their numbers now, we will be fighting the disaster and the creatures at the same time.
dialogueChunks.outro: If this reaches the settlement, we lose everything. Kill the {enemy_type_plural} before they overrun us.

dialogueChunks.intro: Since {quest_origin}, {player_name}, the danger keeps coming. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_is} failing, and {quest_stakes_the} could be lost any day.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: What worries me most is the {enemy_type_plural} that have moved into the damaged areas {location_hint}. They are nesting in the ruins and growing bolder by the day. Until they are cleared, no one can safely reach the areas we need to repair.
dialogueChunks.outro: Everything has turned against us. Deal with the {enemy_type_plural} so we can fight back.

dialogueChunks.intro: It happened so fast, {player_name}. One moment everything was normal. Then {quest_threat_the} hit and {quest_focus_the} just... crumbled.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The survivors scattered, and now {enemy_type_plural} are prowling the debris field {location_hint}. {quest_ally} tried to organize a salvage team, but they were driven back. {quest_stakes_human_The} {quest_stakes_human_is} sheltering in the open with nothing between them and those creatures.
dialogueChunks.outro: Kill the {enemy_type_plural} lurking near {quest_focus_the} so our people can find safe ground.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I have lived here my whole life and I have never seen anything like this. {quest_threat_The} did not just damage {quest_focus_the}: it broke the land itself.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The upheaval opened passages that were sealed for ages, and {enemy_type_plural} are pouring out of them {location_hint}. They are disoriented and aggressive, attacking anything that moves. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} directly in their path.
dialogueChunks.outro: Seal those breaches with steel. Kill every {enemy_type} that crawled out before they reach the settlement.

dialogueChunks.intro: We have been through disasters before, {player_name}. This one is different. {quest_threat_The} left {quest_focus_the} in a state that attracts predators.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} spotted a hunting pack of {enemy_type_plural} circling the ruins {location_hint}. They are not scavenging: they are stalking the survivors. {quest_stakes_human_The} {quest_stakes_human_is} too exhausted and injured to defend themselves.
dialogueChunks.outro: Those people need a fighter, not a builder. Hunt down the {enemy_type_plural} before they pick off anyone else.
